/usr/bin/c++  -fopenmp -fpermissive -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_contain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_srtm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_gdal_fetch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_gdal_output.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_gdal_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_grid_interp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_array2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_timezone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_buffer_grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_stl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_rmtree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_utm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_landfireclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_gmted.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_simplenomadsclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_main.dir/test_utctime.cpp.o -o test_main  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mdenham/WindNinjaParalelo/windninja/build/src/ninja /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnetcdf.so /usr/lib/libgdal.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_unit_test_framework.so.1.74.0 ../src/ninja/libninja.so
